channel.title: Social Elite Marketing Group — Insights
channel.description: Operator-grade marketing playbooks from Social Elite Marketing Group.

item.title: Meta Ads for Local Service Businesses in 2026: What Works
item.description: Meta ads for local service businesses in 2026 demand new playbooks. The structures, creative, and benchmarks that print ROI for HVAC, roofing, dental, law.

item.title: High Intent Lead Generation for Service Businesses: 5 Leak Points
item.description: Most service businesses leak 40%+ of paid leads before booking a call. Here are the 5 funnel stages we audit before spending another dollar on ads.

item.title: AI Agents for Marketing Agencies: Replacing VAs by 2026
item.description: Discover how AI agents will autonomously handle ad operations, reporting, and lead nurturing, replacing VAs in marketing agencies by 2026. Get our stack recommendations.
